enrichment.summary: Kyle briefly vlogs about December 21st, 2016, recapping spending the day at his mom's birthday with extended family including an uncle, aunt, and cousins, then returning home to watch Hell on Wheels, talk with his long-distance girlfriend, and work on a Google Earth project he may have underestimated in scope.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: appreciates them, says they make his girlfriend feel present
uncertain if he bit off more than he can chew, plans to reassess at beginning of February

entities: Kyle's mom's brother and wife and two kids
